prompt: Drag each salience label onto the region of the Venn where it belongs — the overlap of Power, Legitimacy and Urgency that stakeholder holds. Two of the labels are decoys that are not salience types — leave those in the tray.
caption: Power · Legitimacy · Urgency.

tokens.label: 'Dormant'
tokens.why: 'Dormant: power only — a latent stakeholder you monitor.'

tokens.label: 'Discretionary'
tokens.why: 'Discretionary: legitimacy only — keep informed, low effort.'

tokens.label: 'Demanding'
tokens.why: 'Demanding: urgency only — noisy, but little power or legitimacy.'

tokens.label: 'Dominant'
tokens.why: 'Dominant: power + legitimacy — a formal player; keep satisfied.'

tokens.label: 'Dangerous'
tokens.why: 'Dangerous: power + urgency, no legitimacy — coercive; contain the threat.'

tokens.label: 'Dependent'
tokens.why: 'Dependent: legitimacy + urgency, no power — needs a champion.'

tokens.label: 'Definitive'
tokens.why: 'Definitive: power + legitimacy + urgency — top priority; manage closely.'

tokens.label: fakes[0]
tokens.why: fakes[0] + ' is not a salience type — a plausible-sounding decoy, so leave it in the tray.'

tokens.label: fakes[1]
tokens.why: fakes[1] + ' is not a salience type — a plausible-sounding decoy, so leave it in the tray.'

explanation: One attribute = latent (Dormant / Discretionary / Demanding); two = expectant (Dominant / Dependent / Dangerous); all three = Definitive — your highest priority. Any other label is a decoy.

prompt: Drag each engagement strategy onto the quadrant it matches. Power runs up the side; interest across the bottom.

tokens.label: 'Manage closely'
tokens.why: 'High power + high interest → manage closely (your key players).'

tokens.label: 'Keep satisfied'
tokens.why: 'High power, low interest → keep satisfied; don’t overload them.'

tokens.label: 'Keep informed'
tokens.why: 'Low power, high interest → keep informed; useful allies.'

tokens.label: 'Monitor'
tokens.why: 'Low power, low interest → monitor with minimal effort.'

explanation: Read power first: high power = Manage Closely (interested) or Keep Satisfied (not); low power = Keep Informed (interested) or Monitor (not).

prompt: Each corner of the stakeholder cube is a power × interest × attitude combination. Drag each character onto its cell.
caption: Rows = power & interest · columns = attitude (backer / blocker).

tokens.label: 'Saviour'
tokens.why: 'High power, active, backer — your best ally; engage fully.'

tokens.label: 'Saboteur'
tokens.why: 'High power, active, blocker — the biggest threat; manage and contain.'

tokens.label: 'Sleeping giant'
tokens.why: 'High power, passive, backer — wake them up.'

tokens.label: 'Time bomb'
tokens.why: 'High power, passive, blocker — dormant opposition; watch closely.'

tokens.label: 'Friend'
tokens.why: 'Low power, active, backer — a confidant and sounding board.'

tokens.label: 'Trip wire'
tokens.why: 'Low power, active, blocker — minor but vocal opposition.'

tokens.label: 'Acquaintance'
tokens.why: 'Low power, passive, backer — keep gently informed.'

tokens.label: 'Irritant'
tokens.why: 'Low power, passive, blocker — low impact; don’t over-invest.'

explanation: The cube adds attitude to power/interest: a high-power blocker (Saboteur, Time bomb) is the corner to fear; a high-power backer (Saviour, Sleeping giant) is the ally to engage.

prompt: You’re dealing with {{examples[k]}}. Drag the label that describes this stakeholder onto the correct region of the Venn — leave the other labels in the tray.
caption: Power · Legitimacy · Urgency.

derived.desc: ['power only','legitimacy only','urgency only','power and legitimacy','power and urgency','legitimacy and urgency','all three attributes']
derived.examples: ['a senior manager from another division — power, but no stake or deadline','a colleague or an NGO giving feedback — a legitimate voice with no power or urgency','the CEO’s assistant urgently chasing information — urgent, but no power or legitimate stake','your line manager or a government clearance office — powerful and legitimate, no deadline','a group threatening disruptive action — powerful and urgent, but not legitimate','local residents affected by the works — a legitimate, urgent claim but no power','your executive sponsor and the key customer — power, legitimacy and urgency together']

tokens.label: names[k]
tokens.why: 'Correct — this stakeholder holds ' + desc[k] + '.'

tokens.label: names[d1]
tokens.why: 'Holds ' + desc[d1] + ' — not this stakeholder, so leave it in the tray.'

tokens.label: names[d2]
tokens.why: 'Holds ' + desc[d2] + ' — not this stakeholder, so leave it in the tray.'

tokens.label: fakes[0]
tokens.why: fakes[0] + ' is not one of the seven salience types — a plausible-sounding decoy, so leave it in the tray.'

tokens.label: fakes[1]
tokens.why: fakes[1] + ' is not one of the seven salience types — a plausible-sounding decoy, so leave it in the tray.'

explanation: {{examples[k]}} → {{names[k]}} ({{desc[k]}}), the {{descZone[k]}} region. The seven salience types are Dormant, Discretionary, Demanding, Dominant, Dangerous, Dependent and Definitive — anything else is a decoy.

prompt: A stakeholder has {{powint[k]}}. Drag the engagement strategy that fits onto their quadrant — leave the others in the tray.

derived.powint: ['high power and high interest','high power but low interest','low power but high interest','low power and low interest']

tokens.label: strat[k]
tokens.why: 'Correct — ' + powint[k] + ' calls for this strategy.'

tokens.label: strat[d1]
tokens.why: 'The strategy for ' + powint[d1] + ' — not this stakeholder.'

tokens.label: strat[d2]
tokens.why: 'The strategy for ' + powint[d2] + ' — not this stakeholder.'

prompt: Drag each salience label onto the region of the Venn where it belongs — read the circle labels carefully, the layout is different this time. Two of the labels are decoys that are not salience types — leave those in the tray.
caption: Power · Legitimacy · Urgency (rearranged).

tokens.label: 'Dormant'
tokens.why: 'Dormant: power only — here Power is the top-right circle.'

tokens.label: 'Discretionary'
tokens.why: 'Discretionary: legitimacy only — Legitimacy is the bottom circle.'

tokens.label: 'Demanding'
tokens.why: 'Demanding: urgency only — Urgency is the top-left circle.'

tokens.label: 'Dominant'
tokens.why: 'Dominant: power + legitimacy — the top-right ∩ bottom overlap.'

tokens.label: 'Dependent'
tokens.why: 'Dependent: legitimacy + urgency — the bottom ∩ top-left overlap.'

tokens.label: 'Dangerous'
tokens.why: 'Dangerous: power + urgency — the top-left ∩ top-right overlap.'

tokens.label: 'Definitive'
tokens.why: 'Definitive: all three attributes — the centre.'

tokens.label: fakes[0]
tokens.why: fakes[0] + ' is not a salience type — a plausible-sounding decoy, so leave it in the tray.'

tokens.label: fakes[1]
tokens.why: fakes[1] + ' is not a salience type — a plausible-sounding decoy, so leave it in the tray.'

explanation: The zones are physical positions; the attribute at each circle changed. Match each label to the overlap holding its attributes: e.g. Dormant (power only) goes wherever Power sits — top-right here. Any label that is not one of the seven types is a decoy.
